name: Number C5: Chaos Chimera Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カオス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>５ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>亡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>朧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> カオス・キマイラ・ドラゴン
name_jp_rom: Kaosu Nanbāzu Go Mōrōryū Kaosu Kimaira Doragon
name_jp_tl: Chaos Numbers 5: Perishing-Gloom Dragon - Chaos Chimaera Dragon
desc:
3+ Level 6 monsters
Gains 1000 ATK for each material attached to it. If this card attacks, at the end of the Damage Step: You can detach 1 material from this card; this card can attack an opponent's monster again in a row. At the end of the Battle Phase: You can pay half your LP, then target 2 cards in any GY(s); place 1 of them on the top of the Deck, and if you do, attach the other to this card as material.

jp_sets.set: Collectors Pack: Duelist of Legend Version

action: Places cards from the player's Graveyard on the top of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's Graveyard on the top of the Deck
Attaches from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
Attaches from your opponent's Graveyard as Xyz Material
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
attack: Can make multiple attacks on monsters
